title: ranunculus lagascanus
intro: Ranunculus lagascanus, also known as Lagasca's buttercup, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ranunculus lagascanus include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infused in oil for use in herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
